description_long: This bungalow features a single-story rectangular structure with light blue horizontal siding and a flat roof. The front facade includes a single door and a large window, while the side facade displays three large windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The interior layout is divided into several rooms with white partition walls and brown flooring in select areas, suggesting living, dining, and bedroom spaces. The rear of the bungalow has a single window and a back door, while the opposite side is windowless, emphasizing privacy. The overall design is simple and functional, with a modern, minimalistic aesthetic. A detached flat object resembling a floor plan or instruction sheet is placed adjacent to the building.
description: A single-story, light blue bungalow with large windows, a flat roof, and a simple, modern layout. The structure features white interior walls and brown flooring in select rooms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance door, a large window, and a glimpse of the interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting three large windows and a clear view of the room divisions inside.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single window and a back door, plus the detached floor plan object.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no windows, showing the length of the building and interior partitions.
